sections.sectionTitle: Jew Mite Suksiat ding Haman' Sawmna

verses.text: Hih thute khit ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag-te beh Hammedatha' tapa Haman a za khangsak a, amah tawh a semkhawm ulian dangte khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in a bawl hi

Tua ahih ciangin kumpi huang sunga om kumpipa' nasem khempeuh in Haman zahtak bawlin ama mai-ah kun uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua banga a hih ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi. Ahih hangin Mordekai pen amah zahtakna limin a mai-ah kunlo hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa' huang sunga om kumpipa' nasemte in Mordekai kiangah, “Bang hangin kumpipa' thupiak manglo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Nisimin amaute in Mordekai kiangah gengen uh a, ahih hangin amah in mang nuamlo hi. Jew mi ahihna thu amaute kiangah gen khin ahih manin tua banga ama nialna a kimang ding mah ahi hiam cih a theihna dingun Haman kiangah a thu ko uh hi
Ama mai-ah Mordekai a kunlohna, amah a zahtakbawl lohna a theih ciang-in Haman nak heh mahmah hi
Amah in Mordekai' mipihte a theih ciangin amah bek suktaak salo a, Ahasueras' kumpi gamsung khempeuhah a om Jew mi khempeuh, Mordekai leh a minam buppi-in a suksiat theihna ding lampi a zong hi

Kumpi Ahasueras' uk a kum sawmlenihna, a kha masa pen ahi Nisan kha-a kipanin a ni ni, a kha kha-in Pur a kici aisanna tawh Haman' muhin ai kisan a, a kha sawmlenihna Adar kha a ni sawmlethum ni-in ai a pha hi

Tua ciangin Haman in Kumpipa Ahasueras' kiangah, “Na ukna gam tuamtuam sunga om mite lakah a om kawikawi, amau a tuam om mi pawlkhat om hi. Amau' ngeinate pen midangte-a' tawh kibanglo a, amaute in nangma thukhamte zuilo uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih mite na hici khahkhong ding kilawmlo hi

Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh amaute a kisuksiatna ding thu pia-in lai-in gelh in. Tua hi leh nangma sumkholna sungah koih dingin na khutnuai-a na uliante tungah ngun talen tul sawm ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ama khutsung panin a minthuhna zungbuh suahin Jew mite' gal, Agag-te beh Hammedatha' tapa Haman' tungah a pia hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah, “Na sum cihte nangmah kong piakik hi; na mi cihte zong nangma khutsungah kong pia hi; na ut bangbangin bawl in,” a ci hi

A kha masa a ni sawmlethum ni-in kumpipa' lai-atte khempeuh kisam a, Haman' genna tawh kizui-in kumpipa' nuai-ah gam tampi a uksawnte leh gam khat a uksawnte, leh gam uksawnte' khutnuai-ah a mi tuamtuamte lakah uliante tungah lai kipaisak hi. Gam khempeuhah amau' lai ciat, mi khempeuh tungah amau pau ciatin kigelh hi. Hih lai pen kumpipa Ahasueras' min tawh kigelhin kumpipa' minthuhna zungbuh tawh min kithuh hi

Tua bangin kumpipa' ukna gam khempeuhah laitaite kipiasak a, Adar kha ahi a kha sawmlenihna a ni sawmlethum ni, ni khat sungin Jew mi a moi a ham, numei naupang, a vekpi-in susia-in, thatin, a beisakmangna ding uh, leh a neihsate uh a laksakna dingun thu kipia hi
Tua a ni seh ni-in amaute a baihsa-in a om theihna dingun hih thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuhah dal khat ciat kipuakin tua thu pen a gamsung mi khempeuh tungah a kizasak kim ding ahi hi

Kumpipa' thupiakna tawh laitaite kinawh sawl a, hih thupiakna pen kumpi khua Susa khuapi panin a kihawmkhia ahi hi. Kumpipa leh Haman zu ne-in om hithiat uh a, ahi zongin Susa khuapi sung buai mahmah hi.
